item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution mode and provided a practical incident analysis with main causes, responsibility boundaries, summary framing, and improvement actions.
